text.title: Agile BA Frameworks Mapping Core Rules
text.summary: 4 testable rules every application of Agile BA Frameworks Mapping enforces.

rule.statement: Mapping declares exactly one framework target (scrum | safe-team | safe-program | safe-solution | safe-portfolio). No multi-framework collapse.
Every named ceremony (standup, refinement, planning, review, retro, PI-planning) carries ≥1 BA activity OR explicit 'not BA'.
rule.rationale: Missing ceremony coverage produces gaps invisible until incidents.

rule.statement: Each activity has a type (elicit | refine | validate | trace | review | document) so cross-cycle aggregation works.
BA owner named per activity; 'BA team' is forbidden.
